resources.string: Health Connect is not installed on this device.\nPlease install it from the Play Store.

Your 7-day rolling heart health score.
Based on how often and how hard you challenge your heart.

• 100+: Optimal
• 75-99: Neutral
• 50-74: Warning
• < 50: Poor
Average heart rate during sleep.\nTarget: lower or equal to your 30-day rolling average. (Lower = Recovered)
Variation between heartbeats in milliseconds.\nTarget: Within or above your 30-day rolling average. (Higher = Recovered)
Minimum heart rate captured within %1$dm before and %2$dm after wake up.\n\nBaseline: %3$d bpm %4$s (%5$d bpm)
Minimum heart rate captured around wake up time.\n\nNot enough data to calculate baseline.

Ratio of acute to chronic training load.
Indicates if training is sustainable.

• 0.8-1.3: Optimal balance
• <0.8: Under-training
• >1.3: Overtraining risk
We found data from multiple sources. Pick the device whose readings should drive your scores — we\'ll fall back to other devices for days it didn\'t record.
No specific devices were detected. We\'ll use all available data sources.
Which device should we use for health metrics?
No devices found from Health Connect
